Support

We at Care Labs strive to offer end-to-end support to all our clients in India. We are power system consultants with expertise in providing advanced arc flash study solutions for safety, reliability, efficiency, and compliance goals.

Contact Us
System

Equipment Requiring Arc Flash Protection

Our arc flash solutions are comprehensive, from data collection and incident energy calculation to arc flash boundary and arc flash PPE selection.
  • Power Distribution & Transmission Equipment- Transformers, Busbars & Bus Ducts, and Circuit Breakers.
  • Protective Devices and Relays- Circuit Breakers, Protective relays, Fuses
  • High-risk electrical equipment- Busbars, Capacitor banks, Harmonic filters.
﻿Industries

Indian Industries We Serve

Increasing energy demands and a shift towards sustainability have urged industries to conduct arc flash studies to protect their critical assets.
FAQs

Arc Flash Study in India - Q & A

    Why is arc flash study important for Indian industries ?

Arc flash studies for Indian industries are done to serve many goals like protecting personnel and equipment, complying with safety standards such as CEA (Central Electricity Authority) guidelines, IS/IEC 60909, IEEE 1584, and NFPA 70E, reduce downtime due to potential risks, and optimize protection for selective fault isolation. Care Labs’ arc flash hazards assessments help Indian industries realize all their electrical safety goals in one go.

    How often will an arc flash risk assessment be updated in India ?

Arc flash studies conducted regularly help maintain the general health of the power system. At Care Labs, we recommend our clients adopt proactive safety by conducting regular arc flash analysis every 3 to 5 years or when there are major changes in the system.

    What are the insights in the Care Lab's arc flash study report ?

Care Labs collects data and simulates various case scenarios with the help of ETAP during an arc flash analysis in India. The result is a comprehensive report that contains the following insights:

  • Incident energy levels at different system locations
  • Proper labeling for electrical panels and equipment
  • Recommended PPE for workers
  • Optimized protection settings for relays and circuit breakers
  • Arc flash boundary details
    What is arc flash labeling, and is it mandatory for Indian industries ?

Arc Flash Labels are critical safety information labels that give insights into incident energy levels, arc flash PPE requirements, and arc flash boundaries. While it is not mandatory, arc flash labels are the best practice to protect workers against these hidden threats.

    How can my company get an arc flash study done in India ?

Only experienced power system consultants can conduct an arc flash analysis for industries and other facilities in India. We at Care Labs have the expertise and technology to help you make your power system safe and secure. For more details, contact us.

Equipment Requiring Load Flow Analysis

Contact Us

Industries

Our Expertise Help These Industries

With industries shifting more toward renewable energy integration, we see a great demand for power flow analysis in Indian industries.
FAQs

Load Flow Analysis In India- Q & A

    What is Load flow analysis ?

It is a critical electrical study in electrical engineering to determine the steady-state operating conditions of a power system. With a power flow analysis, you get the following data:

  • Voltage profile at various bus bars and other devices.
  • Flow of power in the transmission lines
  • Losses in the system
  • System efficiency and reactive power requirements
    Is load flow analysis mandatory for Indian industries ?
It is not mandatory to conduct load flow analysis in India. However, it is very critical for maintaining the efficiency and identifying the losses. Care Labs recommends these studies as part of proactive safety measures to safeguard the power system in a facility.
    What are the key results of load flow analysis in India ?

Some of the results of this study are:

  • Prevent voltage surges for proper functioning of critical equipment.
  • Determine how power and load are distributed across the network.
  • Identify power losses in transformers, cables, etc.
  • Data for expansion of power system and renewable energy integration.
    How can I get the load flow analysis done ?
You can hire good power system consultants in India, like Care Labs. We have the right skills and technology to power your electrical safety in compliance with regulatory standards, both global and local.
    How can I get a quote for power flow analysis from Care Labs ?
You can directly contact us to get a free quote on load flow analysis in India. Our team will guide you through and through.

Technology

Equipment Requiring Relay Coordination Study

Care Labs’ protection coordination study encompasses analyzing relays and other protective devices to evaluate their coordination and performance.
Contact Us
Industries

Industries That Need Protection Coordination

With rapid industrialization, it is crucial to protect critical assets from electrical hazards. We help these industries safeguard their devices.

FAQs

Relay Coordination Study In India- Q & A

    What is a Relay Coordination study ?
A relay coordination study is done to ensure that the protective devices are working in coordination so that any faults that occur are disbanded from the healthy section. Care Labs helps facilities in India set up time-optimized and selective fault isolation with in-depth protection coordination studies.
    What are the various steps in the relay coordination study ?

A typical power system protection coordination study entails the following steps:

  • Data Collection
  • Determine the fault current levels with short circuit analysis
  • TCC Characteristics analysis
  • Adjusting the settings for optimal response times.
  • Using ETAP simulation software, verify the relay operations.
    What are the ramifications if relay coordination is not done properly ?
If the protective relays are not working properly, frequent outages and cascading faults are the main consequences. With delayed fault clearance, critical devices can get damaged, which may result in high maintenance costs. Care Labs’s value-enhancing protection coordination, however, helps make informed decisions based on the reports of the study.
    Is relay coordination study mandatory in India ?

Although relay coordination study is not mandatory in India, it is advisable to conduct the studies every three to five years or when there are major changes in the system.

    What is the cost of conducting relay coordination in India ?
The cost of protection coordination studies in India depends on the size and complexity of the facility. For more information, contact our team or experts, who can give you a free quote.

Contact Us

Industries

Industries We Provide Solutions For

For a stable and safe electrical network, diverse industries invest in short circuit analysis services in India.
FAQs

Short Circuit Analysis In India- Q & A

    What must be my biggest concern in electrical safety- worker safety, equipment protection, or compliance with standards ?
Although electrical safety concerns depend on industry, operational risks, past incidents, and so on, it is essential to have a balance on all the above factors. A proactive approach to electrical safety that covers all the key concerns is the best way to go ahead.
    Is short circuit analysis mandatory for the utility industry in India ?
Utility industries need to comply with CEA regulations, IEC framework, etc. Insurance and safety audits often mandate fault analysis in India. Care Labs’ short circuit analysis for Indian industries can help you assess and mitigate the risks associated with electrical hazards.
    What types of faults are analyzed during short circuit analysis by Care Labs ?
We analyze Three-phase faults, Single-line-to-ground (SLG) faults, Line-to-line faults, and Double-line-to-ground faults. These analyses help clients get a comprehensive idea of how the system reacts to various kinds of faults.
    Does short circuit analysis data help in arc flash studies ?
Yes, short circuit analysis data is essential for arc flash studies. The fault current magnitudes are required to determine incident energy levels. Further, it helps in determining the best arc flash PPE, arc flash boundaries, and labeling. With Care Labs as a partner, you can ensure quick fault isolation.
    What is the data that I can get from a short circuit analysis ?

The following can be determined using a short circuit analysis:

 

  • Fault current levels at various buses and nodes.
  • Circuit breaker and fuse ratings to handle fault currents
  • Optimized relay settings to avoid cascading faults in the system
  • Identify the vulnerable points in the system where fault levels exceed the limits.
